$schema._description: Character outfit/skin promotions per game. Only list skins that are currently sold at a limited-time discount. Dates are UTC calendar dates (YYYY-MM-DD); the app appends the same per-game maintenance-end time as banners (GI T05:00:00Z, HSR/ZZZ T03:00:00Z) and shows a skin only while start <= now < end.

_fields.character: Character/agent the outfit is for (display name).
_fields.outfit: Outfit/skin name as it appears in-game.
_fields.priceNow: Discounted price during the promotion (integer, in the game's premium currency).
_fields.priceWas: Regular price after the promotion ends.
_fields.currency: Premium currency name — GI: Genesis Crystals, HSR: Oneiric Shards, ZZZ: Monochrome.
_fields.image: Outfit splash/portrait image URL from the game Fandom wiki.
_fields.url: Optional Game8 or wiki guide link for the outfit.
